candidates.why: Explicit operating D&A line exists, but it appears below gross profit alongside operating overhead rather than within or alongside the selected COGS bucket ('Cost of sales' / 'Cost of goods sold'). No row explicitly ties D&A to COGS/COR, so adding it to COGS would risk misclassification.
Component of the total 'Depreciation and amortization'; not COGS-specific and should not be chosen over the summary row.
D&A-like row but appears as a separate operating item, not clearly tied to COGS; also blank in the preview.
Component of total D&A and not COGS-specific.
Residual component of total D&A, not a preferred choice when a summary row exists.
Component/adjustment within total D&A, not COGS-specific.

variables.notes: Selected COGS bucket is the direct cost-of-sales bucket. The visible D&A rows are separate operating-expense lines below gross profit and are not explicitly labelled as COGS/COR components. Conservatively do not add any D&A separately to COGS.

candidates.why: This is the clear summary operating D&A row above EBIT. It sits separately from the selected XSGA component rows ('Other operating costs', 'Payroll and related costs', etc.), so it should be added separately later to avoid omission. Prefer the summary row over component rows to avoid double counting.
Component of the summary 'Depreciation and amortization' row; do not use when the summary row exists.
Potential D&A-related operating item, but not needed separately when a broader D&A summary row exists and this row is blank in the preview.
Component of total D&A; inferior to the summary row for avoiding double count.
Residual component of total D&A; do not select alongside the summary row.
Component/adjustment under total D&A; do not select alongside the summary row.

variables.notes: The selected XSGA bucket consists of multiple operating overhead rows and explicitly excluded D&A in the prior step. A separate same-level summary row 'Depreciation and amortization' is visible above EBIT, so it should be added separately to XSGA later. No separate R&D row was selected, and no R&D-specific amortization row is visible.
